settings.title: Alert thresholds
settings.description: Customize the values that trigger alerts for each sensor

alerts.suddenChange: Sudden change in {sensor}: {value}{unit} ({pct}% deviation from average)

THRESHOLD_HIGH.0: Close the blinds to block solar radiation
THRESHOLD_HIGH.1: Turn on air conditioning or a fan
THRESHOLD_HIGH.3: Check if an unintentional heat source is active

THRESHOLD_LOW.0: Turn on heating or increase the temperature setting
THRESHOLD_LOW.1: Check if a window has been left open
THRESHOLD_LOW.3: Verify the thermostat is working correctly

SUDDEN_CHANGE.0: Check if a window or door was just opened
SUDDEN_CHANGE.1: Make sure no heating device was accidentally turned on
SUDDEN_CHANGE.2: Verify the ESP32 sensor is well positioned (not in direct sunlight)

THRESHOLD_HIGH.2: Check for water leaks (plumbing, roof, condensation)

THRESHOLD_LOW.1: Check if the heating is too intense
THRESHOLD_LOW.2: Place indoor plants to increase humidity

SUDDEN_CHANGE.0: Check if a steam-producing device is on
SUDDEN_CHANGE.1: Check for water leaks near the sensor
SUDDEN_CHANGE.2: Verify the ESP32 sensor is not exposed to condensation

THRESHOLD_HIGH.0: Open a window immediately to ventilate the room
THRESHOLD_HIGH.2: Reduce the number of people in the room if possible
THRESHOLD_HIGH.3: Check if combustion appliances are running
THRESHOLD_HIGH.4: Avoid intense physical activity in the room

SUDDEN_CHANGE.0: Check if several people entered simultaneously
SUDDEN_CHANGE.1: Make sure no combustion appliance was turned on
SUDDEN_CHANGE.2: Check the CO₂ SCD30 sensor status (calibration)

THRESHOLD_LOW.0: A low pressure system is approaching, risk of bad weather
THRESHOLD_LOW.1: Close windows in anticipation of rain or strong wind
THRESHOLD_LOW.2: Verify the BME280 sensor is not exposed to drafts

SUDDEN_CHANGE.1: Check weather forecasts for your area
SUDDEN_CHANGE.2: Make sure windows and shutters are secured

SUDDEN_CHANGE.0: Check if a strong light was turned on/off near the sensor
SUDDEN_CHANGE.1: Verify the BH1750 sensor is not obstructed

notifications.allSensorsNormal: All sensors are within normal range
notifications.emptyHealthyDesc: No anomalies detected on your sensors
